items.title: Why Guardiola's legacy could exceed the likes of Ferguson, Wenger, Klopp
items.summary: Exit as a Premier League champion like Sir Alex Ferguson? Or leave behind a strong foundation like Jurgen Klopp? Pep Guardiola has the chance to do both.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Caleb Williams: I'll miss D.J. Moore personally, understand trading him was business
items.summary: "You build up a relationship on a personal level and it sucks that he has to go," Williams said. "I'm excited for him the rest of his career to see what he does."
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Jude Bellingham buys minority stake in Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix
items.summary: Real Madrid star and Birmingham City graduate invests approx £1 million in home city club
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
